items.title: SA premier defends course development despite LIV Golf doubts

children.content: Peter Malinauskas compares spending $45 million to redevelop the North Adelaide golf course to similar funding for the AFL to play in the Barossa Valley, as media reports suggest Saudi Arabia's Public Investment Fund is preparing to pull financial support for LIV Golf.

gallery.altText: A concept design of a golf course with trees and a city in the background and sunset sky

thumbnail.altText: A concept design of a golf course with trees and a city in the background and sunset sky

items.title: Police charge man for allegedly attending businesses while nude

children.content: A Mount Gambier man is granted bail after he was allegedly nude while in businesses and on a busy main road three times in the past week.

image.altText: A police officer in a cap standing in front of a police station

items.title: Adelaide skipper ruled out of Showdown after brother's funeral

children.content: Adelaide Crow's skipper Jordan Dawson has been ruled out of Friday's Showdown following his brother's sudden death.

image.altText: Jordan Dawson shares a heartfelt hug with Hugh McCluggage

items.title: ATSB confirms student and instructor killed in Parafield plane crash

children.content: The ATSB said the plane had been doing circuit training at the airport, but it's not yet known if structured training was underway when it crashed.

articles.title: What we know about the fatal plane crash in Adelaide

children.content: Investigations are underway into a light plane crash at an airport in Adelaide's north that claimed two lives and injured 10 others.

image.altText: Smoke among hangars and grass at an airport

items.title: Electrifying your home comes with savings, but conversion costs stopping many

children.content: A new report says the money consumers could save by converting from gas to electricity is set to increase over the coming decades, sparking calls for government regulation to encourage the switch.

image.altText: A yellow sign on a wooden post which reads 'we're electrifying!'

items.title: Long wait for SA upper house result creating 'confusion and uncertainty'

children.content: With less than a week until state parliament resumes, an incoming upper house member says she still cannot access the building or appoint staff because the election result is yet to be declared.

image.altText: A woman with brown hair wearing a blue dress

items.title: Wine code of conduct details emerge as industry continues to shrink

children.content: Industry representatives welcome a new mandatory code of conduct that dictates how wineries treat wine grape growers, but it may be too late for some producers.

image.altText: Rows of grapevines lie in darkness as the yellow sun peeks over distant hills

items.title: Daughter continues dad's Murray fight as 'transformational moment' looms

children.content: Julie Jones has lived by the River Murray all her life and wants all South Australians to participate in the first comprehensive review of the Murray-Darling Basin Plan.

image.altText: A woman on a deck with a river in the background

items.title: One person seriously injured in fire that destroyed Adelaide Hills restaurant

children.content: Police say a person has been seriously injured in a suspicious fire that destroyed an Adelaide Hills restaurant on Tuesday night.

image.altText: Firefighters battle a restaurant fire

items.title: Mother who faked 6yo son's cancer diagnosis sentenced to over four years' jail

children.content: A mother who faked her six-year-old son's cancer diagnosis to raise thousands of dollars has been jailed for more than four years for the "cruel, calculated" and "manipulative" crime.

image.altText: A blurred black-and-white photo of a small boy apparently with a bandaged head.

items.title: High fuel costs a 'kick in the guts' for country clubs, but the game must go on

children.content: Country sporting clubs are rallying to help families attend fixtures as fuel prices double, with some travelling up to 640 kilometres. But it is an extra cost many will take on to maintain the sports are so integral to their communities.

image.altText: Woman with two braids with her daughters aged 12, 9 and 7 in red an black netball uniforms beside the blue court

items.title: Chalmers does little to quell CGT debate as budget looms

children.content: Seven years ago, proposed changes to capital gains tax and negative gearing were named as part of the reason Labor lost the unlosable election. Times have changed.

image.altText: Jim Chalmers

children.content: The Women's State of Origin series begins in NSW, where the Sky Blues and Queensland Maroons play at Hunter Stadium in Newcastle. Follow live.

children.content: A goal after the siren from Dylan Moore allows Hawthorn to claim a draw against Collingwood at the MCG. Follow live.

children.content: The Global Sumud Flotilla has been intercepted by the IDF, an official tweet by the group says.

items.title: Apologetic insurer claims customers were not tricked in renewal notices

children.content: When the corporate regulator accused RACQ of misleading customers with insurance renewal notices, the insurer apologised. Now, it is defending the notices in court filings.

image.altText: Blue letters spelling RACQ at the top of a white building.

items.title: Artist who taught himself to paint after seeing Roy and HG portrait wins prize

items.title: Private school denies discouraging parents from telling victims about deepfake incident

children.content: The principal of a Tasmanian private school denies claims by two parents that the school ever tried to discourage them from telling their daughters they had been identified in AI deepfake images.

items.title: 'Forever changed': Parents speak after children killed in house fire

children.content: A statement shared by the parents of two children killed in a Bowen Mountain house fire say their "family's world has been forever changed".

image.altText: Myla Summer-Lea Hughes smiling in a blue shirt, and River William Higgins smiling in a striped orange and blue shirt.

items.title: Melbourne teacher charged after camera found in school bathroom

children.content: The 33-year-old was arrested at the school in the city's south-east after the discovery of a camera in a bathroom.

items.title: Mining prohibited 'in perpetuity' from culturally significant reserve

children.content: Pilungah Reserve, south-west of Mount Isa, has become Queensland's third special wildlife reserve, barring any future mining activity.

items.title: Bottle shops awash with illicit booze as police probe arson attacks

children.content: The National Drug Research Institute found 30 per cent of bottle shops it audited across different areas of Melbourne and regional Victoria were stocking illicit alcohol.

image.altText: Spirit bottles in an alcohol shop.

items.title: CFMEU delegates hired as health and safety representatives, inquiry hears

children.content: The commission of inquiry into the CFMEU in Queensland hears that contractors were pressured to hire delegates as safety representatives at a Cross River Rail site.

image.altText: CFMEU flags blowing in the wind

items.title: 'Breach of trust': Woman convicted of illegally obtaining medication

children.content: A Canberra speech pathologist is convicted of using the details of people she knew, including parents of two of her patients, to illegally obtain prescription medication.

image.altText: A concrete building reading "Law Courts of the Australian Capital Territory", with Australian, ACT and Aboriginal flag.

items.title: 'Unfathomable': Truckies want higher penalties for dangerous driving

children.content: Truck drivers say the fines for dangerous overtaking should match drink driving penalties due to the risk it poses to other road users

items.title: Fed-up residents 'leaving town' due to murky tap water

children.content: When residents of Narrandera, in southern NSW, turn on the tap, the water that comes out is sometimes so dirty it stains their clothes.

items.title: Controversial $500m South West wind farm approved

children.content: WA's Regional Development Assessment Panel approves Synergy's proposed 20-turbine wind farm in the state's South West, ending a period of approvals that has divided the community.

image.altText: Ariel shot of the Scott River winding through green bushland

items.title: Mark Latham ordered to pay $100k to MP he sexually harassed and vilified

children.content: The former One Nation MP has been found to have vilified openly gay politician Alex Greenwich in the second case centring around a dispute between the pair.

image.altText: a composite image of Alex Greenwich and Mark Latham
